articles.title: Kraken may delist USDT in EU to comply with MiCA
articles.description: Major crypto exchange Kraken is considering delisting Tether (USDT) from its EU platform to comply with the upcoming Markets in Crypto-Assets (MiCA) regulations, according to a recent report from Bloomberg. The European Union is setting MiCA regulations for crypto trading, specifically targeting stablecoins like Tether's USDT. These rules will be enforced starting in July and will likely...

articles.title: Solana Proves to Be the Fastest Blockchain with 1,504 TPS
articles.description: Solana proves to be 46 times faster than Ethereum and 5 times faster than Polygon.

articles.title: Chinese Police Bust $1.9 Billion Crypto Banking Ring
articles.description: On May 15, the Chengdu Public Security Bureau announced the dismantling of a vast underground banking network, arresting 193 suspects across China. These individuals were involved in illegal businesses utilizing crypto, specifically Tether (USDT). The comprehensive crackdown revealed illicit transactions totaling approximately 13.8 billion yuan (~$1.9 billion). How Chinese...

articles.title: $10,000 Ethereum (ETH) by Year-End? Analyst Makes Bold Price Prediction
articles.description: Prominent cryptocurrency analysts have recently expressed bullish sentiment on Ethereum ($ETH), the second-largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization, with one suggesting it will surge to over $10,000 by the end of the year. Michaël van de Poppe, a cryptocurrency analyst with over 700,000 followers on the microblogging platform X (formerly known as Twitter), expressed optimism, suggesting...

articles.title: Bitcoin Price Prediction: BTC Above $65K Amid $100M Andrew Tate Investment and Supply Lows
articles.description: Bitcoin Price Prediction: With BTC trading above $65K, Andrew Tate's $100M investment fuels bullish sentiment amid decreasing supply on exchanges.
